daily.today_energy: Mercury's giving you that main character energy today. You're vibrating at a frequency where people actually want to listen to what you're saying. Lean into conversations that feel meaningful.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the shift in your aura. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your superpower right now. Don't dim yourself down trying to fit an idea of what love should look like.
daily.career: Your ideas have legs today. That project or pitch you've been sitting on? The universe is lowkey pushing you toward sharing it. Trust your instincts more than you trust the doubt in your head.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Your nervous system is ready to release what's been heavy.

weekly.overview: Your vibe this week is all about authentic self-expression, Sag. The cosmos is nudging you to speak your truth without overthinking it. Trust that magnetic energy you naturally carry—it's working harder than you think.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, this is your moment to be unapologetically you. Someone's gonna be drawn to that realness. If you're already vibing with someone, deeper convos are on the menu.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are sharp right now. This isn't the week to play small—pitch that idea, take the meeting, show up differently. Your professional energy is giving main character energy.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and listen more. Moving mindfully—whether that's yoga, walks, or just stretching—will feel way better than pushing hard. Rest is productive too.
